title: Phase 1A: Background supervisor + file layout
description: Implement the background job supervisor in specialists run --background. Create .specialists/jobs/<id>/ directory structure. Write status.json (atomic), events.jsonl (append), result.txt on completion. Implement GC of old jobs on startup. Add --background and --continue flags to run CLI arg parser. Supervisor lifecycle per spec-v3.md section 3.1. Uses existing PiAgentSession (no protocol changes).

title: Phase 1B: CLI commands (result, feed, stop, status jobs)
description: Add new CLI commands: specialists result <id> (print result.txt), specialists feed (tail events.jsonl), specialists stop <id> (SIGTERM via PID from status.json). Modify specialists status to include job summary table from .specialists/jobs/*/status.json. Wire new subcommands in src/index.ts.

title: Phase 1C: Hook notification + init .gitignore
description: Create specialists-complete.mjs UserPromptSubmit hook that scans .specialists/ready/ for completion markers and injects banners. Add .specialists/ to .gitignore in specialists init. Add hook to specialists install deployment.
